languages.text: "А как же твои ребята? Были преступниками — теперь и против Бога-Императора пойдут? Инквизиция второго шанса не дает".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ "Сам подумай. Были преступниками — теперь в еретики подались? Инквизиция второго шанса не даст".

languages.text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."
languages.original_text: "А как же твои ребята? Были преступниками — теперь и против Бога-Императора пойдут? Инквизиция второго шанса не дает".

traits.locale_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."
"What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."
"What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

languages.text: “那你的士兵呢？他们以前是罪犯，难道现在还要背叛神皇吗？审判庭可不会给他们第二次机会。”
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: “那你的士兵呢？他们以前是罪犯，难道现在还要背叛神皇吗？审判庭可不会给他们第二次机会。”

languages.text: « Et vos soldats ? Ces anciens criminels vont maintenant se retourner contre l'Empereur-Dieu ? L'Inquisition n'accorde pas de seconde chance. »
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: « Et vos soldats ? Ces anciens criminels vont maintenant se retourner contre l'Empereur-Dieu ? L'Inquisition n'accorde pas de seconde chance. »

languages.text: "Peki ya askerlerin? Bir zamanlar suçluydular, şimdiyse Tanrı İmparator'a karşı mı gelecekler? Engizisyon, ikinci bir şans vermez."
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: "Peki ya askerlerin? Bir zamanlar suçluydular, şimdiyse Tanrı İmparator'a karşı mı gelecekler? Engizisyon, ikinci bir şans vermez."

languages.text: «¿Qué hay de sus soldados? ¿Fueron criminales y ahora le dan la espalda al Dios Emperador? La Inquisición no otorga segundas oportunidades».
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué hay de sus soldados? ¿Fueron criminales y ahora le dan la espalda al Dios Emperador? La Inquisición no otorga segundas oportunidades».

languages.text: "Was ist mit Euren Soldaten? Sie waren einmal Kriminelle und wenden sich jetzt gegen den Gottimperator? Die Inquisition gewährt keine zweiten Chancen."
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: "Was ist mit Euren Soldaten? Sie waren einmal Kriminelle und wenden sich jetzt gegen den Gottimperator? Die Inquisition gewährt keine zweiten Chancen."

languages.text: 「あなたの兵士はどうですか？彼らはかつて犯罪者でした。そして今、神皇帝に反旗を翻すのでしょうか？宗教裁判は2度目のチャンスを与えません。」
languages.original_text: "What about your soldiers? They were criminals once, and now they will turn against the God-Emperor? The Inquisition does not grant second chances."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの兵士はどうですか？彼らはかつて犯罪者でした。そして今、神皇帝に反旗を翻すのでしょうか？宗教裁判は2度目のチャンスを与えません。」
